# WKWebExtension.DataRecord.Error

**Structure**

Constants that indicate errors in the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/DataRecord] domain.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Error
```

## Type Properties

- **errorDomain**: Indicates a [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/DataRecord] error.
- **localStorageFailed**: Indicates a failure occurred when either deleting or calculating local storage.
- **sessionStorageFailed**: Indicates a failure occurred when either deleting or calculating session storage.
- **synchronizedStorageFailed**: Indicates a failure occurred when either deleting or calculating synchronized storage.
- **unknown**: Indicates that an unknown error occurred.

## Conforms To

- CustomNSError
- Equatable
- Error
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
